description: Use this API to add a quadratic cost curve table record to the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing quadratic cost curve table record. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_csttbl_quad(tbl, labl, cost, nprs, xy)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_csttbl_quad(tbl, labl, cost, nprs, xy)

parameters.name: tbl
parameters.description: Quadratic cost curve table number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: labl
parameters.description: Cost table description of, at most, 12 characters. (input; ‘ ‘ by default).

parameters.name: nprs
parameters.description: Number of (xi, yi) coordinate pairs to be specified (no default). (input).

parameters.name: xy
parameters.description: An array of 2*NPRS elements specifying Coordinate pairs from 1 to NPRS. Xi is the control variable value. Yi is the total cost or energy consumption value. (input; Xi and Yi have defaults of 0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: cost table data table is full.
exceeded maximum number of allowable cost curve data pairs.
number of data pairs must not be negative.
incremental costs are not monotonically increasing.
MW values are not monotonically increasing.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
